grounded_in: Step 04 result (commit 1573893): the original target made CL degenerate.
no_tuning_to_2024_attestation: K is fixed from 2019-2023 BEFORE computing any 2024 label; 2024 base-rates are MEASURED ONCE and reported as-is; the method (vol-scaling) was selected on the degeneracy MECHANISM (absolute-level inflation), not on 2024 outcomes; no iteration on 2024 results.

options_compared_conceptually.A_absolute_quantile_ORIGINAL: per-market absolute fwd-maxDD threshold = 2019-2023 q80. REJECTED: a fixed absolute level set by an extreme historical regime (2020 oil) is not regime-appropriate for a calmer period -> degeneracy (CL 0%).
options_compared_conceptually.B_rolling_recent_window_threshold: per-market threshold = q80 of COMPLETED fwd-maxDD labels over a trailing window (point-in-time, label-completed <= t). Adapts to recent vol; valid. Slightly heavier machinery (trailing label distribution).
options_compared_conceptually.C_volatility_scaled_regime_relative_SELE: standardize the forward drawdown by decision-time vol, then threshold a SINGLE pooled K. bad=1 iff z(t) = fwd_maxDD(t,H) / (trailing_21d_realized_vol(t) * sqrt(H)) >= K, with K = the 80th percentile of z over 2019-2023 POOLED across all 4 markets (estimated on pre-2024 data ONLY). SELECTED: regime- and market-relative by construction (a drawdown 'bad' relative to prevailing vol), comparable across markets, single pre-committed K, directly removes the absolute-level inflation that caused CL degeneracy.

problem_statement: Original target: bad=1 iff forward 21-bar max-drawdown >= per-market ABSOLUTE threshold = each market's 2019-2023 q80 of forward-maxDD. CL's 2019-2023 q80 = 0.152 (inflated by the extreme 2020-2022 oil period); the calmer 2024 never reaches it -> CL 2024 base-rate = 0.0 (DEGENERATE), blocking CL per-market modeling/evaluation.

selected_rule.K_definition: K = pooled 80th-percentile of z over ALL 2019-2023 decision dates across all 4 markets (label-window completed within discovery); estimated on PRE-2024 data ONLY; a SINGLE K shared by all markets.
selected_rule.decision_time_scale: sigma_H(t) = trailing_21d_realized_vol(t) * sqrt(21)  [uses only data <= t]
selected_rule.forward_statistic: fwd_maxDD(t,H) = running peak-to-trough max drawdown of the underlying close over (t, t+H] common-calendar bars (MARKET-STATE statistic; NOT a strategy return)
selected_rule.label: bad_regime=1 iff z(t) >= K
selected_rule.leakage: numerator uses the forward label window (allowed for a target); denominator sigma_H(t) uses only data <= t; K from 2019-2023 only -> no 2024/2025 information enters the threshold.
selected_rule.name: volatility_scaled_regime_relative_bad_regime

unchanged_from_step_02: t+H<=last-discovery-bar label cap (no reach into sealed 2025)
